tipRules.tip: Hackney: 'A Texas-rigged soft plastic is tops for versatility in post-spawn conditions and even outshines the classic jig in tournament conditions.'
Hackney: 'In clearer water, make quick targeted presentations. In dirty water, soak the bait longer to give bass more time to react and find the bait.'

knowledge.insight: Hackney: 'As bass conclude spawning, big females seek thick heavy grass to rest, recuperate, and feed up on bluegills and crawfish.'

Hackney: 'Use the 7-foot-11 flipping stick for standard flipping and a 7-foot-6 version for different pitching scenarios. Balance rod action, bait weight, and the need for precise efficient hook sets.'
